diary.helpModalSub: This is the heart of the app. The AI interprets everything and organizes it in {{name}}'s Panel.
diary.helpPanelNote: All content is classified by AI and automatically saved in your pet's Panel.
diary.helpVoice: Tell what happened. The AI transcribes, interprets, and narrates about {{name}}.
diary.helpPhoto: Take a photo of anything — pet, food, prescription, or vaccine card. The AI analyzes and records it.
diary.helpScanner: Scan receipts, vet prescriptions, health plans, or insurance policies. OCR + AI extract and organize everything.
diary.helpDocument: Upload a PDF or file. The AI reads, interprets, and classifies it automatically in the pet's Panel.
diary.helpVideo: Record the pet in action. The AI analyzes behavior, mood, and visual health.
diary.helpGallery: Select photos or videos from the gallery. The AI processes and adds them to the pet's history.
diary.helpListen: Record the pet's sounds — barks, meows, breathing. The AI detects emotion and health state.
diary.helpText: Prefer writing? Type freely and the AI narrates about {{name}}.

settings.aiTrainingNote: Only anonymized data. Never your name, address or identifying information. You can revoke at any time.

help.title: Help & Support
help.faqDesc: Most common questions about the app
help.reportBugDesc: Something not working? Let us know

faqItems.q1: How do I register my pet?
faqItems.a1: On the main screen, tap 'New Pet'. You can take a photo and AI identifies the breed, or register manually.
faqItems.q2: Biometrics don't work, what do I do?
faqItems.a2: Log in with email and password first. Then close and reopen the app — biometrics will work next time.
faqItems.q3: Can I register animals other than dogs and cats?
faqItems.a3: For now, AuExpert is exclusive to dogs and cats. New animals may be added in the future.
faqItems.q4: How does AI photo analysis work?
faqItems.a4: Take a photo of your pet and AI identifies breed, estimates age, size and health observations. Always confirm or edit the results.
faqItems.q5: Does the app work without internet?
faqItems.a5: Yes! You can still see your data and make changes. When internet returns, everything syncs automatically.

legal.privacyIntro: AuExpert respects your privacy. Here's how we protect your data:
legal.privacyData: Your data is protected on Supabase with encryption and Row Level Security. Only you can access your pets' data.
legal.privacyPhotos: Your pets' photos are stored securely and never shared with third parties.
legal.privacyAi: AI analyzes photos and texts only to generate insights about your pet. No data is used to train models.
legal.privacyDelete: You can delete your account and all data at any time in settings.
legal.termsIntro: By using AuExpert, you agree to these terms:
legal.termsUse: The app is for personal use by dog and cat owners. Commercial use is not allowed.
legal.termsAi: AI analyses are estimates and DO NOT replace veterinary consultations. Always consult a professional.
legal.termsContent: You are responsible for the content you publish (photos, texts). Offensive content will be removed.
legal.termsChanges: We may update these terms. You will be notified about important changes.

menu.logoutDesc: End session and return to login
